"'''Artoo's Day Out'''" is an 8-page comic written by [[Ryder Windham]] from [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 1]] which was published by [[Topps]] in Fall 1994.

==Plot summary==
[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], under the ownership of Baron [[Pitareeze]], assists the Baron as a translator for his business negotiations, leaving [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] behind to watch the [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]. During this time, R2 is stolen by [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and transported off-planet. However, the ship is interrupted by a heavily-armed security ship, at which point R2 gets into a lifepod and zooms back to the planet's surface, just in time to meet with Pitareeze and Threepio as if nothing ever happened.
